segments.text: If they try to avoid it, they're pretty limited routing-wise, so
segments.original_text: 避けようと思うとかなりルート制限されてしまうんで

segments.text: Pressuring with the aerial threat while fishing for the grab
segments.original_text: 空中攻撃がありますよっていう圧をかけつつ掴みを

full_text: If they try to avoid it, they're pretty limited routing-wise, so pressuring with the aerial threat while fishing for the grab
